name: Empty state guidance (Frappe-Vue)
algorithm: Presentational component renders a calm, blame-free empty state with sensible defaults that switch on a variant prop ('empty' vs 'no-results'). Primary/secondary action labels are passed in (e.g. frappe._() strings) and the component emits primary/secondary; the parent owns the resource. Optional autofocusPrimary focuses the primary action on mount.
reduced_motion: Fade/raise appear animation removed under prefers-reduced-motion; content simply shows.
responsive_behaviour: centered, capped at 30rem; actions wrap on narrow screens; no fixed pixel motion
browser_support: All modern browsers; Vue 3 + scoped CSS only.
accessibility: Labelled role=region landmark; decorative icon aria-hidden; real button actions with visible focus rings and 44px targets; autofocus off by default so focus is never yanked.
